title: Ghost of the Past returns a cemetery creature to hand

card.rawText: Return a creature from your cemetery back to your hand.

plan.title: Ghost of the Past returns a cemetery creature to hand
plan.summary: Play Ghost of the Past with a creature in player_1 cemetery and verify that creature moves to hand.

notes: Place one player_1 creature in cemetery before play.

steps: Player 1 plays Ghost of the Past.
Choose a creature from player_1 cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Returned creature no longer in cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm only creature cards are legal cemetery targets.
riskNotes: Target prompt selection must prefer own cemetery creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
